title: teucrium canadense subsp. occidentale
intro: Teucrium canadense subsp. occidentale, also known as western mountain joe pye weed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits associated with western mountain joe pye weed include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Western mountain joe pye weed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
